name: Mark Egan
abstract: Mark Egan (born January 14, 1951, in Brockton, Massachusetts) is an American jazz bassist known for his membership in the Pat Metheny Group and the Gil Evans Orchestra. He is co-founder of the jazz fusion band Elements.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Shadowfax/ Alex De Grassi

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Ascione
about_quotes.evidence: So I got to be good friends with Mark and it’s a real treat to play with him and Jeff.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Ascione interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 17, 2001
